customer_issue: AI support answer gave a confident deployment root cause without enough logs.
technical_requirement: Block unsupported answers and require retrieval-grounded evidence.
ai_workflow_design: Retrieve logs/runbooks, run eval gate, route HOLD decision to reviewer.
implementation_decision: Use eval-gate checks for missing retrieval grounding and unsupported details.
escalation_feedback_loop: Send trace_id and missing evidence list to support reviewer.

customer_issue: Support team repeatedly asks why retrieval missed deployment runbooks.
ai_workflow_design: Cluster feedback into issue taxonomy and classify repeat issue patterns.
implementation_decision: Use AutoOps-style customer analytics and repeat issue flags.
escalation_feedback_loop: Create product feedback to improve retrieval coverage.

customer_issue: Dashboard users need to see whether an answer was held, shipped, or escalated.
technical_requirement: Expose traceable decisions in frontend dashboard.
ai_workflow_design: Show eval-gate result, trace viewer, incident timeline, and release state.
implementation_decision: Use React/TypeScript components with typed API integration.
escalation_feedback_loop: Route HOLD/ESCALATE states into human-review queue.
